# Curator Receipt

## Decision

Kept because the source is a structured comparative benchmark artifact with concrete reported numbers and visible provenance.

## Why

The excerpt contains explicit benchmark and telemetry figures across multiple coding agents, including named evaluations such as SWE-bench Verified, HumanEval, Terminal-bench, latency measurements, productivity study percentages, and operating telemetry. It also states that metrics are taken from first-party pages, blog posts, or repositories, and includes reference attribution. That makes it more than commentary: it is a comparative compilation of concrete source-attributed evidence.

## Limits
